allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; cfg=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkg=[p for p in cfg['packages'] if p['name']=='reminder'][0]; print\(pkg\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('.dart_tool/package_config.json'\)\); fl=[p for p in d['packages'] if p['name']=='flutter']; print\(fl[0]\)")

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\fessy\\.claude\\projects\\c--flutter-dev-projects-reminder-reminder\\494c384a-4ebe-4e71-a3be-49d716e97cf8.jsonl' -Tail 15; foreach \($line in $lines\) { try { $d = $line | ConvertFrom-Json; $role = $d.role; $content = $d.content; if \($content -is [string]\) { $short = $content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $content.Length\)\); Write-Host "$role : $short" } elseif \($content -is [array]\) { foreach \($c in $content\) { if \($c.type -eq 'text'\) { $short = $c.text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $c.text.Length\)\); Write-Host "$role : $short" } } } } catch {} })
